content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Sat, 14 Feb 2026 00:34:21 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 230 | Critical: 67 | High: 21 | Medium: 23 | Low: 119

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Jury deadlocked in the trial of Stanford students charged after pro - Palestinian protests in 2024 (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] US Department of Homeland Security to go into shutdown due to funding lapse (Al Jazeera)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Trump administration ends temporary protected status for Yemenis in US (Middle East Eye)
  [MIDDLE EAST] 'Knock it off Saudi Arabia': Lindsey Graham scolds Saudi leader over rift with UAE (Middle East Eye)
  [EUROPE] Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche (BBC Europe)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (55 events, 23 critical, 5 high):
    - Jury deadlocked in the trial of Stanford students charged after pro - Palestinian protests in 2024
    - US Department of Homeland Security to go into shutdown due to funding lapse
    - Trump administration ends temporary protected status for Yemenis in US
  Ukraine/Russia (13 events, 3 critical, 2 high):
    - The war dead pictured on banned Ukrainian athlete's helmet
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
    - How Russia’s Invasion is Impacting Ukraine’s Youth
  Europe (36 events, 12 critical, 2 high):
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
    - Motorway collapses as deadly storms hit France, Portugal and Spain
    - Siemens SINEC NMS
  Indo-Pacific (37 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (5 events, 1 critical, 2 high):
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
    - Two US Navy ships collide near South America
  Global (65 events, 15 critical, 4 high):
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source
    - University expels student who called for accountability over Hong Kong fire
    - Canada school deaths suspect created shooting simulator on gaming platform

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC World, BBC Africa, The Guardian, NYT World, Defense News, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, CISA Advisories, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
